You don't build a full product — you build a tiny, laser-focused tool that solves ONE thing better than anything else. Examples: a tool that auto-formats LinkedIn posts, a meal planner that generates grocery lists, a habit tracker for ADHD people. $19/month × 500 users = $9,500 MRR.
